programs.title: The Block
programs.desc: (PG) There is a new judge in town, and he does not hold back. Find out who takes home $10,000 for their studio bathroom.

programs.title: The Block
programs.desc: (PG) The contestants size up their competition when they visit each other's bathrooms. A fiery body corporate shows that these Blockheads may not be one big happy family.

programs.title: The Block
programs.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.
